# kanidm_application (Resource)

Manages a Kanidm application entry.

Applications are used for per-user application passwords in legacy LDAP/basic-auth style integrations. Each application links to a single Kanidm group; only members of that group may mint application-specific credentials for the app.

## Example Usage

```hcl
resource "kanidm_group" "mail_users" {
  name = "mail-users"
}

resource "kanidm_application" "mail" {
  name         = "mail"
  displayname  = "Mail"
  linked_group = kanidm_group.mail_users.id
}
```

Use this resource for application-password style integrations where users authenticate to an app with per-application credentials rather than their primary Kanidm password.


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `displayname` (String) Display name for the application.
- `linked_group` (String) Group UUID or name whose members may mint application passwords for this application.
- `name` (String) Unique application name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Stable Kanidm UUID for this application.
